description: Expanded rank correlation dataset: all publicly documented carbon credit agency ratings collected from press releases, case studies, blog posts, and the CMW 2023 report. Extends the original 6-project CMW Table 20 dataset and 11-project cross-type dataset to 30 credits.

scale_mappings.comment: Monotonic integer mappings for rank correlation. Higher = better quality on every scale.

projects.name: Ecomapua Amazon REDD+
projects.notes: Maximum inter-agency disagreement. Sylvera Tier 1 vs BeZero C vs Calyx D.

projects.name: Keo Seima Wildlife Sanctuary REDD+
projects.notes: Three-grade-band gap between BeZero A and Calyx E.

projects.name: Mai Ndombe REDD+
projects.notes: World's largest VCS REDD+ by area. Wildlife Works developer.

projects.name: Envira Amazonia Project
projects.notes: JRA Agropecuaria developer. BeZero BBB is the agency outlier.

projects.name: Luangwa Community Forests Project
projects.notes: Community-based REDD+. BioCarbon Partners.

projects.name: Guanare Forest Restoration Project
projects.notes: Commercial eucalyptus plantation ARR. Our v0.4.1 applied commercial_plantation_arr adjustment.

projects.name: Climeworks Orca (DACCS Iceland)
projects.source: Climeworks press release; BeZero first-ever AAA rating (Aug 2024)
projects.notes: BeZero's first-ever AAA. DACCS with geological storage via CarbFix mineralization, powered by geothermal.

projects.name: Novocarbo Carbon Removal Site Rhine
projects.source: BeZero first-ever biochar rating (Dec 2023); BeZero Novocarbo case study
projects.notes: BeZero's first-ever biochar rating. PYREG pyrolysis of wood/fruit-stone residues. Surplus heat to district heating.

projects.name: Exomad Green Concepcion (Biochar Bolivia)
projects.source: Exomad Green press release (Feb 2025); Senken biochar guide
projects.notes: World's largest biochar facility. AA from both BeZero and Sylvera. ~260,000 tCO2/yr removed. Three-way agreement (our AA, BeZero AA, Sylvera AA).

projects.name: EcoSafi Clean Cooking (Kenya)
projects.notes: BeZero's highest-ever cookstove rating. Only A-rated cookstove globally (as of Dec 2024). IoT monitoring via Gold Standard Metered methodology.

projects.name: BURN / Key Carbon Global Cookstoves (Kenya)
projects.source: BURN press release; Calyx CCP cookstove research (2025)
projects.notes: Calyx AA rating. Among first CCP-labelled cookstove carbon projects. Distributes Kuniokoa improved woodstoves.

projects.name: Arborify Cookstoves Togo
projects.source: Calyx Global CCP cookstove research; Arborify blog (Nov 2025)
projects.notes: First improved cookstove project (excl. metered) to receive Calyx A. 250,000 stoves over 5 years in Togo.

projects.name: Rebellion Energy Heartland 1 Methane Abatement
projects.notes: First ACR credits for orphan well plugging. BeZero A = top 6% of all rated projects. 80,792 tCO2e.

projects.name: Family Forest Carbon Program (US IFM)
projects.notes: BeZero BBBe rating (e = ex ante). Highest of BeZero's public US IFM ratings at the time.

projects.name: Southern Cardamom REDD+ (Cambodia)
projects.notes: BeZero B with rating watch. Human Rights Watch allegations triggered Verra suspension. Our human_rights disqualifier caps at B.

projects.name: Qnergy Weber County Landfill Methane
projects.notes: BeZero A for landfill methane using TORCH4 Stirling engine. Our BBB reflects avoidance permanence penalty.

projects.name: Chinese Onshore Wind (VCS 1188)
projects.source: BeZero renewable energy rating case study
projects.notes: BeZero used VCS 1188 as case study. 49.3 MW wind in China. ICVCM rejected grid-connected renewables.

projects.name: Kariba REDD+ (Zimbabwe)
projects.notes: BeZero downgraded BBB -> D, then delisted entirely. Verra placed on hold. Sylvera found 75-90% baseline overstatement. Our B reflects lowest viable grade. Directional agreement.

projects.name: 1PointFive STRATOS DAC (Texas)
projects.notes: BeZero AAApre (pre-rating, ex ante). World's largest planned DAC facility (500,000 t/yr). Occidental subsidiary. Geological storage in Texas. Our scoring: pending (expected AAA based on DACCS archetype).

projects.name: Octavia Carbon Project Hummingbird (DAC Kenya)
projects.notes: BeZero AAA. Second-ever AAA rating after Climeworks. First commercial DAC plant on African continent. Geothermal-powered. Our scoring: pending (expected AAA based on DACCS archetype).

projects.name: Mati Carbon Enhanced Rock Weathering (India)
projects.notes: BeZero AApre. Highest climate credibility score for an Indian climate tech project. Enhanced rock weathering on farms. Our scoring: pending (no ERW archetype yet; expected AA based on permanence and MRV profile).

projects.name: Tradewater Thailand 6 (ODS Destruction)
projects.notes: ODS (refrigerant) destruction project. 120,000+ kg of seized CFCs/HCFCs. CCP-approved methodology. Our scoring: pending (expected A based on industrial avoidance archetype with strong MRV).

projects.name: Rebellion Energy Heartland 2 Methane Abatement
projects.notes: Same developer as Heartland 1 (A-rated) but rated BB. ~2M verified credits from orphan wells in Oklahoma. Lower rating than H1 may reflect project-specific risk factors.

projects.name: Rebellion Energy Heartland 3 Methane Abatement
projects.source: BeZero public listings (Apr 2026); MSCI press release (Oct 2025)
projects.notes: BeZero BB vs MSCI AA -- significant inter-agency disagreement on same project. ~600,000 tCO2e, 2024 vintage. MSCI rates in top 10% while BeZero rates moderately low. Valuable multi-rater data point.

projects.name: Guyana Jurisdictional REDD+
projects.notes: BeZero's first jurisdictional REDD+ rating. ART-TREES credits used by airlines for CORSIA. Our scoring: pending (no J-REDD archetype yet).

projects.name: BRCarbon Brazilian Amazon APD Grouped Project
projects.notes: First-ever Verra-registered Latam REDD+ to achieve BeZero A. APD grouped project. Limited additionality risk, low over-crediting risk, reduced non-permanence risk. Our scoring: pending.

projects.name: REDD+ Brazil Nut Concessions (Madre de Dios, Peru)
projects.source: Stay Grounded report (2024); BeZero public rating
projects.notes: BeZero C. Significant baseline overstatement concerns. Bosques Amazonicos developer. Deforestation in project area doubled after project start.

projects.name: C-Quest Capital Cookstove Projects (aggregate)
projects.source: Calyx Global commentary on C-Quest Capital (2024)
projects.notes: Calyx rated 11 C-Quest Capital projects: 60%+ received E or E+, remainder D. High over-crediting risk. fNRB overestimated by ~230%. Not a single project but representative of low-quality cookstove category. Used as aggregate data point.

projects.name: Rimba Raya REDD+ (Indonesia)
projects.source: Net-Hero project listing; BeZero rating as of Sep 2023 (pre-license revocation)
projects.notes: BeZero initially rated AA, subsequently downgraded. License revoked by Indonesian government in 2024 for carbon trading violations. Our B reflects non-permanence risk from regulatory uncertainty. Rating data point may be stale.

projects.name: Cordillera Azul National Park REDD+ (Peru)
projects.source: Stay Grounded investigation; AP investigation; BeZero public rating
projects.notes: BeZero C. AP investigation documented inflated baselines (700% population growth assumption). Used by LATAM, Qantas. Our B reflects severe additionality and baseline concerns. Directional agreement.
